---
title: "Welcome"
---

This is a small test website built from files in a GitHub repository.

## How it works

You edit the `.qmd` source files, commit them with Git, and push them to GitHub. GitHub Actions then asks Quarto to build the public HTML website and deploys it to GitHub Pages.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Your publication test

If you can read this message at `https://leechihyu.github.io/questionlets/`, the complete publishing pipeline is working.
:::

## A simple example

Quarto supports ordinary Markdown, mathematical notation such as

$$
f(x) = x^2 + 2x + 1,
$$

as well as tables:

| Component | Purpose |
|---|---|
| Quarto | Converts source files into a website |
| Git | Tracks changes |
| GitHub Actions | Builds the site after a push |
| GitHub Pages | Hosts the generated website |
